name: Gwain Saga: The Hot Springs
description:
Well, looks like you've found yourself in a bit of a pickle...
(So, fun fact: This bot pretty much erased itself when I went to publish it the first time, so this is technically a re-upload with less tokens. Anyways, the art is by Gkvalhalla on Twitter, and the characters are from GeoExe.)
(If this seems rushed, that's because it kinda is.)
creator: Michael_Mischief
